Introduction
    Sports anthology series exploring iconic Game 7s through first-hand accounts of athletes. It delves into intense pressure at sports' biggest stage, from Cubs' 2016 World Series win to Rangers' 1994 Stanley Cup triumph.

Also known as: ゲーム・セブン ～スポーツ史に残る決戦～
